'''Dewanga''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] [[Slavery/Legends|slaver]] who worked for [[Sebolto]] during the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he was wanted by [[Gorga Desilijic Aarrpo/Legends|Gorga]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] for stealing several of Gorga's personal [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] dancers. He was captured by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] who claimed the [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]].

==Behind the scenes==
Dewanga is located in a settlement which has a balcony which has a Dug sniper guarding the door. The settlement contains pictures of [[Sebulba/Legends|Sebulba]] as well as a podracer bed. This gives the suggestion that he is one of Sebulba's fans and is also possibly the reason why he stole Twi'leks from Gorga the Hutt.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
